Kiraitu Murungi is one of those incoherent, corrupt and idiotic Kenyans who were celebrated only because Kenyans are gullible and suffer from memory loss. As the cabinet minister for energy in Mwai Kibaki’s regime, he was more corrupt than a raccoon. He continued mismanaging public resources as governor for Meru. Now, he is peddling myths because of a sinecure chairmanship of a collapsing state corporation. These raccoons should be jailed as an example to the people that corruption should not benefit the corrupt. Shame on you, Kiraitu! #RutoMustGo
